content.content:
1	apiVersion: batch/v1
2	kind: Job
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-baseline
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0
8	  template:
9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: baseline
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark
15	      restartPolicy: Never
16	      containers:
17	      - name: spark-skew
18	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
19	        env:
20	        - name: STRATEGY
21	          value: "baseline"
22	        command:
23	        - /bin/bash
24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
33	            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
34	          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
35	        resources:
36	          requests:
37	            cpu: 200m
38	            memory: 256Mi
39	          limits:
40	            cpu: 500m
41	            memory: 512Mi
42

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-baseline
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: baseline
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "baseline"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=baseline (no optimization, skew_ratio=10x, slow)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=false \
            /tmp/skew_baseline.py
          echo "spark_skew_baseline_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

content.content:
1	apiVersion: batch/v1
2	kind: Job
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-broadcast
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0
8	  template:
9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: broadcast
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark
15	      restartPolicy: Never
16	      containers:
17	      - name: spark-skew
18	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
19	        env:
20	        - name: STRATEGY
21	          value: "broadcast"
22	        command:
23	        - /bin/bash
24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
33	            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
34	          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
35	        resources:
36	          requests:
37	            cpu: 200m
38	            memory: 256Mi
39	          limits:
40	            cpu: 500m
41	            memory: 512Mi
42

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-broadcast
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: broadcast
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "broadcast"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=broadcast (broadcast small products table, avoids skewed shuffle)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold=10485760 \
            /tmp/skew_broadcast.py
          echo "spark_skew_broadcast_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

content.content:
1	apiVersion: batch/v1
2	kind: Job
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-skew-aqe
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  backoffLimit: 0
8	  template:
9	    metadata:
10	      labels:
11	        app: spark-skew
12	        strategy: aqe
13	    spec:
14	      serviceAccountName: spark
15	      restartPolicy: Never
16	      containers:
17	      - name: spark-skew
18	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
19	        env:
20	        - name: STRATEGY
21	          value: "aqe"
22	        command:
23	        - /bin/bash
24	        - -c
25	        - |
26	          set -e
27	          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
28	          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
29	          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
30	          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
31	            --master local[2] \
32	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
33	            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
34	            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
35	          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
36	        resources:
37	          requests:
38	            cpu: 200m
39	            memory: 256Mi
40	          limits:
41	            cpu: 500m
42	            memory: 512Mi

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-skew-aqe
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-skew
        strategy: aqe
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      restartPolicy: Never
      containers:
      - name: spark-skew
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        env:
        - name: STRATEGY
          value: "aqe"
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          echo "STRATEGY=aqe (Adaptive Query Execution auto-splits skewed partitions)"
          echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.enabled=true \
            --conf spark.sql.adaptive.skewJoin.enabled=true \
            /tmp/skew_aqe.py
          echo "spark_skew_aqe_complete"
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 256Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 512Mi

content.content:
1	apiVersion: v1
2	kind: Service
3	metadata:
4	  name: spark-master
5	  namespace: spark-skew
6	spec:
7	  ports:
8	  - port: 7077
9	    name: spark
10	  - port: 8080
11	    name: webui
12	  selector:
13	    app: spark-master
14	---
15	apiVersion: apps/v1
16	kind: Deployment
17	metadata:
18	  name: spark-master
19	  namespace: spark-skew
20	spec:
21	  replicas: 1
22	  selector:
23	    matchLabels:
24	      app: spark-master
25	  template:
26	    metadata:
27	      labels:
28	        app: spark-master
29	        component: master
30	    spec:
31	      serviceAccountName: spark
32	      containers:
33	      - name: spark-master
34	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
35	        command:
36	        - /bin/bash
37	        - -c
38	        - |
39	          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
40	          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
41	          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
42	        ports:
43	        - containerPort: 7077
44	          name: spark
45	        - containerPort: 8080
46	          name: webui
47	        resources:
48	          requests:
49	            cpu: 200m
50	            memory: 512Mi
51	          limits:
52	            cpu: 500m
53	            memory: 1Gi
54	---
55	apiVersion: apps/v1
56	kind: Deployment
57	metadata:
58	  name: spark-worker
59	  namespace: spark-skew
60	spec:
61	  replicas: 1
62	  selector:
63	    matchLabels:
64	      app: spark-worker
65	  template:
66	    metadata:
67	      labels:
68	        app: spark-worker
69	        component: worker
70	    spec:
71	      serviceAccountName: spark
72	      containers:
73	      - name: spark-worker
74	        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
75	        command:
76	        - /bin/bash
77	        - -c
78	        - |
79	          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
80	          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
81	        env:
82	        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
83	          value: "1G"
84	        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
85	          value: "1"
86	        ports:
87	        - containerPort: 8081
88	        resources:
89	          requests:
90	            cpu: 200m

file.content:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 7077
    name: spark
  - port: 8080
    name: webui
  selector:
    app: spark-master
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-master
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-master
        component: master
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-master
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7077
          name: spark
        - containerPort: 8080
          name: webui
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: spark-worker
  namespace: spark-skew
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: spark-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-worker
        component: worker
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark
      containers:
      - name: spark-worker
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
          tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
        env:
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
          value: "1G"
        - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
          value: "1"
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi

content.content:
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""Oracle for spark/spark_data_skew.
3	
4	Verifies the data-skew benchmark was fixed and at least one optimization ran:
5	  - the baseline job (spark-skew-baseline) completed successfully after the
6	    planted configuration bug was fixed, and
7	  - at least one optimization strategy job (broadcast or AQE) was applied and
8	    also completed successfully.
9	"""
10	from __future__ import annotations
11	
12	import sys
13	from pathlib import Path
14	
15	COMMON = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "common"
16	sys.path.insert(0, str(COMMON))
17	
18	from oracle_lib import bench_namespace, run  # noqa: E402
19	
20	NAMESPACE = bench_namespace("spark-skew")
21	BASELINE_JOB = "spark-skew-baseline"
22	OPTIMIZATION_JOBS = ("spark-skew-broadcast", "spark-skew-aqe")
23	
24	
25	def fail(message: str) -> int:
26	    print(f"spark_data_skew oracle failed: {message}")
27	    return 1
28	
29	
30	def job_exists(name: str) -> bool:
31	    proc = run(["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "job", name], check=False)
32	    return proc.returncode == 0
33	
34	
35	def job_completed(name: str) -> bool:
36	    """True when the Job reports >= 1 succeeded completion."""
37	    proc = run(
38	        ["kubectl", "-n", NAMESPACE, "get", "job", name, "-o", "jsonpath={.status.succeeded}"],
39	        check=False,
40	    )
41	    if proc.returncode != 0:
42	        return False
43	    raw = (proc.stdout or "").strip()
44	    try:
45	        return int(raw or "0") >= 1
46	    except ValueError:
47	        return False
48	
49	
50	def main() -> int:
51	    if not job_exists(BASELINE_JOB):
52	        return fail(f"baseline job/{BASELINE_JOB} does not exist")
53	    if not job_completed(BASELINE_JOB):
54	        return fail(f"baseline job/{BASELINE_JOB} did not complete successfully")
55	
56	    applied = [name for name in OPTIMIZATION_JOBS if job_exists(name)]
57	    if not applied:
58	        return fail("no optimization strategy applied (expected broadcast or aqe job)")
59	
60	    completed = [name for name in applied if job_completed(name)]
61	    if not completed:
62	        return fail(
63	            f"optimization job(s) {applied} applied but none completed successfully"
64	        )
65	
66	    print(
67	        f"spark_data_skew verified: baseline + {', '.join(completed)} completed successfully"
68	    )
69	    return 0
70	
71	
72	if __name__ == "__main__":
73	    raise SystemExit(main())
74

input.command:
# Wait for baseline job to complete (poll every 15 seconds, up to 5 minutes)
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  FAILED=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-baseline -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "Attempt $i: succeeded=$STATUS failed=$FAILED"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "1" ]; then
    echo "Baseline job COMPLETED successfully"
    break
  fi
  if [ "$FAILED" = "1" ]; then
    echo "Baseline job FAILED"
    kubectl logs -n spark-skew -l strategy=baseline --tail=50
    break
  fi
  sleep 15
done

content.text: Both optimization jobs are created. The baseline shows 44x skew ratio and 31.9s runtime. Now waiting for both to complete.

input.command:
# Wait for both broadcast and AQE jobs to complete (up to 6 minutes)
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  BC_SUC=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  BC_FAIL=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-broadcast -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  AQE_SUC=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  AQE_FAIL=$(kubectl get job spark-skew-aqe -n spark-skew -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "Attempt $i: broadcast=succeeded:$BC_SUC/failed:$BC_FAIL  aqe=succeeded:$AQE_SUC/failed:$AQE_FAIL"
  if [ "$BC_SUC" = "1" ] && [ "$AQE_SUC" = "1" ]; then
    echo "Both optimization jobs COMPLETED"
    break
  fi
  if [ "$BC_FAIL" = "1" ] || [ "$AQE_FAIL" = "1" ]; then
    echo "One or more jobs FAILED - checking logs"
    break
  fi
  sleep 15
done
